subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! We send forth Our glorification from this station unto thy countenance, and We beseech the Most High that He may strengthen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا نکبر من هذا المقام علی وجهک و نسئله تعالی بان یویدک علی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
